summary:
Ameloblastoma originates solely within the oral cavity—specifically the jaws—and shows no known occurrences in the brain or central nervous system. It is therefore incorrect to describe it as a benign tumor arising in the brain.

The summary above contains redundant information; please remove redundancies while preserving clarity and accuracy.

Ameloblastoma is a jaw-originating, odontogenic tumor with no reported cases in the brain or CNS. Thus, describing it as a benign tumor occurring in the brain is inaccurately misleading.
